name: Zucchini Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Place zucchini in a 2-quart casserole dish. Cook, covered, on HIGH (full power) for 7-10 minutes (I cooked 15 min.) or until zucchini is thoroughly cooked. Stir halfway through. Drain and set aside.
2. Place hamburger in a 1 quart casserole dish. Cook on HIGH (full power) for 4 to 5 1/2 minutes or until beef is no longer pink. Stir halfway through. Drain.
3. Add tomato paste, basil, oregano, garlic powder, and salt to beef. Set aside.
4. Combine cottage cheese and egg in a small bowl.
5. Layer half of zucchini, bread crumbs, meat mixture, cheese mixture, and mozzarella cheese in an 8 x 8 x 2 (10 x 10) dish.
6. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients, reserving the last layer of mozzarella cheese.
7. Cover loosely with heavy-duty plastic wrap.
8. Cook covered on HIGH (full power) for 7 to 10 minutes or until heated through.
9. Sprinkle the remaining mozzarella cheese over lasagna. Let stand 3 to 5 minutes or until melted.
